_meta.description: Gold Standard Exemplar Library — Proven patterns from past approved releases
_meta.philosophy: This system LEARNS from every successful release. Instead of just telling the production system what it CANNOT do, it shows exactly what WORKS. Every new approval adds to this library, making the next release faster and more confident.

male_enhancement.proven_voice: Clinical/vascular health framing. Never sexual — always physiological. Frame the product as a health optimization tool, not a sexual enhancer. The condition is vascular; the solution is medical.
proven_claim_patterns: 4-ingredient compounded ED formula
Sublingual route bypasses the digestive system entirely
Addresses broader range of ED mechanisms than single-agent therapy
Designed for men who did not get adequate results from single-ingredient generics
Includes physician consultation, medication, and shipping in price
Supports healthy blood flow and vascular function
Clinically studied ingredients for circulatory health
Nitric oxide precursor for endothelial support
Men's vitality support formula
Physician-prescribed treatment program
proven_framing_rules: Frame as VASCULAR HEALTH, not sexual performance
Frame as MEDICAL TREATMENT, not enhancement
Frame as QUALITY OF LIFE, not bedroom results
Use 'ED' (abbreviation) freely — it passes all platforms
Use 'blood flow' and 'circulation' as the mechanism language
Use 'nitric oxide' and 'endothelial function' for science framing
Reference 'physician consultation' and 'prescribed' for authority
Use 'men who have not responded to' for the target audience
proven_headline_patterns: [Product] Review: [Ingredient Count]-Ingredient ED Formula — Does It Work?
[Product]: Physician-Prescribed Men's Vitality Support — What to Know
New [Product] Formula Targets Vascular Health for Men Over 40
[Product] Review: Sublingual ED Compound Gets Attention — Here's Why

reference_releases.key_pattern: Telehealth/prescription framing. Clinical voice. Zero R12 terms. Used 'ED formula', 'sublingual route', 'ED mechanisms' throughout.

Data-limited product. Protective skepticism voice. Transparent about missing ingredients. Brand claims attributed to manufacturer. Same-name confusion warning included. Framed as men's wellness/vitality — no specific ED or cognitive claims. Directed readers to verify URL and seller.

globe_specific.voice: Brand-as-subject + mechanism-forward. '[Brand] is designed to support vascular function through...'
proven_patterns: [Product] is a physician-directed men's wellness formula
[Product] incorporates [N] active compounds targeting vascular health
The formulation is designed to support nitric oxide-mediated blood flow
[Product] is available through a licensed telehealth consultation process

weight_loss.proven_voice: Metabolic science framing. Evidence-graded. Focus on mechanism (how it works) not outcome promises (you will lose X pounds).
proven_claim_patterns: Supports healthy metabolic function
Contains [N] research-backed thermogenic compounds
Formulated with clinically studied doses of [ingredient]
Designed to complement a healthy diet and exercise routine
May help support the body's natural fat metabolism processes
proven_framing_rules: Frame as METABOLIC SUPPORT, not weight loss promises
Frame as COMPLEMENT TO LIFESTYLE, not magic pill
Use 'may help support' hedging on all benefit claims
Reference specific ingredient doses vs clinical literature
Include 'diet and exercise' context for any efficacy claims
Never promise specific pounds or timeframes
proven_headline_patterns: [Product] Review: [Key Ingredient] Metabolism Formula — Evidence Check
[Product]: [N]-Ingredient Metabolic Support — What the Research Shows
New [Product] Targets [Mechanism] for Healthy Weight Management

never_these: lose X pounds in X days

blood_sugar.proven_voice: Glycemic health framing. Supplement supports healthy levels already in normal range. Never implies treatment of diabetes.
proven_claim_patterns: Supports healthy blood sugar levels already within normal range
Contains [N] ingredients studied for glycemic health
Formulated with chromium, berberine, and botanical extracts
Designed to support the body's natural glucose metabolism
proven_framing_rules: ALWAYS include 'already within normal range' qualifier
Frame as SUPPORT, never TREATMENT or CURE
Never reference diabetes, insulin resistance, or A1C directly
Use 'glucose metabolism' and 'glycemic health' as framing
Reference 'healthy lifestyle' as context for any claims

use_these: healthy blood sugar levels already within normal range

brain_health.proven_voice: Cognitive wellness framing. Focus on support and optimization, never treatment of neurological conditions.
proven_claim_patterns: Supports healthy cognitive function
Contains nootropic compounds studied for mental clarity
Formulated to support focus, memory, and mental energy
Designed for adults seeking cognitive performance support
proven_framing_rules: Frame as COGNITIVE SUPPORT, not dementia treatment
Use 'mental clarity', 'focus', 'cognitive performance'
Never reference Alzheimer's, dementia, or brain disease
Reference ingredient-level research, not product-level claims

telehealth.proven_voice: Medical authority framing. Emphasize the three-entity structure (platform + physician group + pharmacy). Frame as access to care, not self-medication.
proven_claim_patterns: Licensed physician consultation included
Prescribed by board-certified providers
Compounded at licensed pharmacy facilities
Telehealth platform connecting patients with licensed medical groups
Individualized treatment plans based on patient health profile
proven_framing_rules: ALWAYS name the three entities: platform, medical group, pharmacy
Frame as ACCESS TO LEGITIMATE MEDICINE, not shortcuts
Emphasize physician decision-making, not patient self-selection
Reference licensing, board certification, state regulations
Include 'individual results assessed by prescribing physician'

reference_releases.key_pattern: Three-entity structure clearly named. Clinical voice. R25 telehealth routing. Zero casual/sales language.
